tool_args.label: B46 Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: B46 Select Bus Service / Proposed B46 SBS Stations / Select Bus Service Improvement Goals

payload.description: Proposed Select Bus Service on the Utica Avenue B46 corridor in Brooklyn. The northern terminal of B46 SBS will be DeKalb Avenue. B46 SBS will make limited stops south of Avenue H. B46 Local will be extended to Williamsburg Bridge Plaza 24 hours a day. Standard (non-articulated) buses will be used. Goals include improving bus speed and reliability, improving bus customer comfort and convenience, and better organizing the street to improve pedestrian safety and driver navigability.
payload.partner_agency: New York City Department of Transportation

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.partner_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Partner agency is relation context. Suggested relation: has_partner.
project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: SBS definition and existing routes
tool_args.raw_text: Select Bus Service (SBS) is New York City's brand name for Bus Rapid Transit...There are 7 Select Bus Service routes serving all 5 boroughs.

payload.claim_text: Select Bus Service (SBS) is New York City's brand name for Bus Rapid Transit: an improved bus service that offers fast, frequent, and reliable service on high-ridership bus routes. There are 7 Select Bus Service routes serving all 5 boroughs.
payload.subject: Select Bus Service
payload.description: Definition of SBS and count of existing routes
